pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 66, 74, 82: event names are 'Security Workshop: Phishing', 'Security Workshop: Data Protection', 'Security Workshop: Incident Response'. Base name verified via export_result.sh line 40 and verifier.py line 29 which search for events containing 'Security Workshop'.

setup_task.sh lines 64-89 create 3 events on Monday. Task description and verifier.py lines 84-94 expect 3 identical events on Tuesday. Total: 3 + 3 = 6. Confirmed by verifier scoring: 15 points for 3 Monday events (line 85) + 30 points for 3 Tuesday events (line 91) = 6 total.
setup_task.sh lines 69, 77, 85 all specify 'location': 'Training Room B' for all three events. Verified by verifier.py line 153 which checks that Tuesday events have location 'Training Room B'.

privileged_info_summary: The task creates 3 synthetic 'Security Workshop' events on Monday of Week 3 (next Monday + 14 days) at times 09:00-10:30, 11:00-12:30, and 13:30-15:00, all in Training Room B. The agent must duplicate these 3 events to Tuesday with identical start times, duration, location, and descriptions. The expected final count is 6 total events (3 Monday originals + 3 Tuesday copies). All data is synthetic, generated via Odoo XML-RPC by setup_task.sh with no external data sources. Event names follow pattern 'Security Workshop: [Topic]' (Phishing, Data Protection, Incident Response).
